raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "summary": "28 days is hyper-accelerated but not unprecedented. YC startups average 3–6 months to reach MVP with 2–4 founders and $120K funding. Solo AI-augmented execution compresses timelines drastically, but infrastructure debt accumulates silently. At 10x users, Postgres RLS policies, Supabase join limits, and Railway CPU caps will break first. Current budget unsustainable at scale — Vercel, Supabase Pro, and AI inference costs will spike past $5K/mo. What breaks: database, authentication latency, asset delivery.", "key_sources": ["YC Standard Deal (2025)", "TechCrunch 'First Round Founders' Report 2026", "Paul Graham, 'Do Things That Don't Scale' (2013)", "Sam Altman, 'How to Succeed as a Solo Founder' (2024)", "Naval Ravikant, 'The Solo Operator' (2023)"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "No cost projections beyond $100/mo. No load testing on Supabase. No audit of Railway's CPU throttling under concurrent AI inference. No fallback for Postgres UUID functions.", "proposed_action": "Run 1K-user simulation via k6 against /assessment endpoint. Benchmark Supabase auth latency. Test Railway's burst CPU limits under load. Migrate critical paths to Fly.io or AWS Lambda before scale. Quantify cost at 10K MAU.", "whistleblower_flag": null}
summary: 28 days is hyper-accelerated but not unprecedented. YC startups average 3–6 months to reach MVP with 2–4 founders and $120K funding. Solo AI-augmented execution compresses timelines drastically, but infrastructure debt accumulates silently. At 10x users, Postgres RLS policies, Supabase join limits, and Railway CPU caps will break first. Current budget unsustainable at scale — Vercel, Supabase Pro, and AI inference costs will spike past $5K/mo. What breaks: database, authentication latency, asset delivery.
key_sources: Paul Graham, 'Do Things That Don't Scale' (2013)
Sam Altman, 'How to Succeed as a Solo Founder' (2024)
gaps_in_current_canon: No cost projections beyond $100/mo. No load testing on Supabase. No audit of Railway's CPU throttling under concurrent AI inference. No fallback for Postgres UUID functions.
proposed_action: Run 1K-user simulation via k6 against /assessment endpoint. Benchmark Supabase auth latency. Test Railway's burst CPU limits under load. Migrate critical paths to Fly.io or AWS Lambda before scale. Quantify cost at 10K MAU.
